name: send_file_telegram
description: Send a local file to a Telegram chat. Use when the user asks to upload or share a file via Telegram.

path.description: Full or home-relative path to the file. Example: /Users/name/Desktop/Files/report.pdf or ~/Desktop/Files/report.pdf

chat_id.description: Telegram chat ID to send to. Falls back to TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID env var if not provided.
